results.raw:
help
===================== AVAILABLE COMMANDS =====================
--- General ---
  help                                  Show this help text
  version                               Print Main + LED MCU firmware versions
--- I/O Expanders (MCP23017 @ 0x20 + 0x21) ---
  io_init                               Initialize both MCP23017s
  io_reset                              Hardware-reset both MCP23017s
  io_read                               Read all expander inputs
--- MCU Pin Readback ---
  mcu_read                              Read all MCU output pin states
--- Motor Enable/Disable (via EXTRA_IO_EXPANDER GPA6..GPA7) ---
  enable  <z|m3>                        Drive EN active (driver ON)
  disable <z|m3>                        Drive EN inactive (driver OFF)
                                        Z1 and Z2 share a single EN line;
                                        'z1'/'z2' are accepted as aliases for 'z'.
--- TMC2209 UART ---
  tmc_init       <z1|z2|m3> [baud]      Init UART (default 115200)
  tmc_status     <z1|z2|m3>             Read TMC2209 status/settings
  tmc_current    <z1|z2|m3> <percent>   Set run current (0-100%)
  tmc_hold       <z1|z2|m3> <percent>   Set hold current (0-100%)
  tmc_microstep  <z1|z2|m3> <n>         Set microsteps (1..256)
  tmc_stealthchop <z1|z2|m3> <on|off>   Toggle StealthChop mode
  tmc_enable     <z1|z2|m3>             Software-enable via UART
  tmc_disable    <z1|z2|m3>             Software-disable via UART
--- Direct Pin Control ---
  dir  <z1|z2|m3> <0|1>                 Set direction pin level
  step <z1|z2|m3> <count> <delay_us>    Pulse STEP pin <count> times
--- TMC429 Motion Controller (mc_) ---
  mc_init [clock_mhz]                   Init SPI + TMC429 (default 32)
  mc_status                             Read version + status flags
  mc_limits <z1|z2|m3> <vmin> <vmax> <amax>
                                        Set limits (all Hz or Hz/s)
  mc_ramp <z1|z2|m3>                    Ramp mode (position w/ trapezoid)
  mc_velocity <z1|z2|m3>                Velocity mode (continuous)
  mc_hold <z1|z2|m3>                    Hold mode (lock position)
  mc_target <z1|z2|m3> <position>       Set target position (ramp mode)
  mc_vtarget <z1|z2|m3> <velocity_hz>   Set target velocity (vel mode)
  mc_pos <z1|z2|m3>                     Read actual + target position
  mc_setpos <z1|z2|m3> <position>       Write actual position register
  mc_stop <z1|z2|m3>                    Stop one axis
  mc_stopall                            Stop all three axes
  mc_switches                           Read all limit switch states
  mc_swpol <high|low>                   Set switch active polarity
  mc_leftstop <z1|z2|m3> <on|off>       Left switch auto-stop
  mc_rightstop <z1|z2|m3> <on|off>      Right switch auto-stop
  mc_rightsw <on|off>                   Enable right switch inputs
--- LED MCU (I2C slave at 0x30) ---
  led_set <ring|all> <anim> <r> <g> <b> <brightness>
                                        anim: off|static|spin|bounce|pulse
                                        r/g/b: 0-255, brightness: 0-255
  led_status <ring>                     Query ring animation state
  led_config <param> <value>            Set persistent config param
                                        params: num_rings, leds_per_ring,
                                        spin_width, bounce_width,
                                        spin_speed, bounce_speed,
                                        pulse_speed (speeds in ms)
  led_getconfig                         Read all config parameters
--- Drawer Handle ---
  drawer_led <off|red|green>            Drive bi-color LED
  drawer_button                         Read drawer button state
--- Solenoids (TRAY_IO_EXPANDER @ 0x20) ---
  sol <0..11> <on|off>                  Drive single solenoid
                                        0-3=T1V1-T1V4, 4-7=T2V1-T2V4, 8-11=T3V1-T3V4
  sol_all <on|off>                      Drive all 12 solenoids
NOTES:
  - All three motors (z1, z2, m3) use independent STEP/DIR/ENABLE.
  - Motor enables are on EXTRA_IO_EXPANDER: 'io_init' first.
  - Motors are DISABLED at boot. Run 'enable' before 'step'.
  - You must 'tmc_init' before any tmc_* command for that motor.
==============================================================

reported v1.0.0

io_init
[IO] Probing EXTRA_IO_EXPANDER at 0x21...
[IO]   Device ACKed at 0x21.
[IO] EXTRA_IO_EXPANDER (0x21) initialized.
[IO]   GPA0-GPA2: Z_BOT / SPARE_TOP / SPARE_BOT limit switches (inputs)
[IO]   GPA3-GPA5: DIAG Z1/Z2/M3 (inputs)
[IO]   GPA6:      Z  EN shared Z1+Z2 (output, active-LOW)
[IO]   GPA7:      M3 EN (output, active-LOW)
[IO]   GPB0:      DRAWER_SW (input)
[IO]   GPB1-GPB6: T1SW1/T1SW2/T2SW1/T2SW2/T3SW1/T3SW2 (inputs)
[IO]   GPB7:      Z_TOP shared Z1+Z2 (input)
[IO] Probing TRAY_IO_EXPANDER at 0x20...
[IO]   Device ACKed at 0x20.
[IO] TRAY_IO_EXPANDER (0x20) initialized.
[IO]   GPB0-GPB3: T2V1-T2V4 (sol 4-7)  (outputs, LOW=off)
[IO]   GPB4-GPB7: T1V1-T1V4 (sol 0-3)  (outputs, LOW=off)
[IO]   GPA0-GPA3: T3V1-T3V4 (sol 8-11) (outputs, LOW=off)
[IO]   GPA4-GPA7: nc (inputs)

mc_init
[MC] Initializing TMC429 on SERCOM4 SPI (nCS=D6) with clock=32 MHz...
[MC]   Communication OK.
[MC]   Version register: 0x429101
[MC]   Step/Dir output mode active.
[MC]   Motor mapping: z1=motor0 (M1), m3=motor1 (M2), z2=motor2 (M3)
[MC]   Limit switches: END1=Left, END2=Right

tmc_init z1
[TMC] Initializing UART for motor 'z1' at 115200 baud...
[TMC]   SERCOM1 (TX=D13/PA16, RX=D12/PA17).
[TMC]   Communication OK.

tmc_microstep z1 8
[TMC] 'z1' microsteps set to 8 per full step.

tmc_current z1 50
[TMC] 'z1' run current set to 50%.

tmc_enable z1
[TMC] 'z1' software-ENABLED.
[TMC]   (Hardware nEnable must also be LOW for driver to run.)

mc_limits z1 100 500 500
[MC] Setting limits for axis z1: vmin=100 Hz, vmax=500 Hz, amax=500 Hz/s
[MC]   Actual vmin=99 Hz, vmax=499 Hz, amax=500 Hz/s

enable z1
[MOTOR] Axis z1 ENABLED (EN driven LOW).
[MOTOR] Note: 'z1' and 'z2' share one EN line ��� both enabled.

mc_velocity z1
[MC] Axis z1 set to VELOCITY mode (continuous rotation).

mc_vtarget z1 500
[MC] Axis z1 target velocity set to 500 Hz (negative = reverse direction)
user response

tmc_init z2
[TMC] Initializing UART for motor 'z2' at 115200 baud...
[TMC]   SERCOM5 (TX=D3/PB16, RX=D2/PB17).
[TMC]   Communication OK.

tmc_microstep z2 8
[TMC] 'z2' microsteps set to 8 per full step.

tmc_current z2 50
[TMC] 'z2' run current set to 50%.

tmc_enable z2
[TMC] 'z2' software-ENABLED.
[TMC]   (Hardware nEnable must also be LOW for driver to run.)

mc_limits z2 100 500 500
[MC] Setting limits for axis z2: vmin=100 Hz, vmax=500 Hz, amax=500 Hz/s
[MC]   Actual vmin=99 Hz, vmax=499 Hz, amax=500 Hz/s

enable z2
[MOTOR] Axis z2 ENABLED (EN driven LOW).
[MOTOR] Note: 'z1' and 'z2' share one EN line ��� both enabled.

mc_velocity z2
[MC] Axis z2 set to VELOCITY mode (continuous rotation).

mc_vtarget z2 500
[MC] Axis z2 target velocity set to 500 Hz (negative = reverse direction)
user response

[TMC] Initializing UART for motor 'm3' at 115200 baud...
[TMC]   Serial1/SERCOM3 (TX=D1/PA22, RX=D0/PA23).
[TMC]   Communication OK.

tmc_microstep m3 8
[TMC] 'm3' microsteps set to 8 per full step.

tmc_current m3 50

[TMC]   (Hardware nEnable must also be LOW for driver to run.)

[MC]   Actual vmin=99 Hz, vmax=499 Hz, amax=500 Hz/s

io_read
[IO] === EXTRA_IO_EXPANDER (0x21) ===
[IO]   Raw: GPIOA=0xC0, GPIOB=0x0
[IO]   --- Limit switches ---
[IO]     Z_TOP     (GPB7): open
[IO]     Z_BOT     (GPA0): open
[IO]     SPARE_TOP (GPA1): open
[IO]     SPARE_BOT (GPA2): open
[IO]   --- TMC2209 DIAG ---
[IO]     Z1 DIAG (GPA3): LOW
[IO]     Z2 DIAG (GPA4): LOW
[IO]     M3 DIAG (GPA5): LOW
[IO]   --- Motor enables (active-HIGH) ---
[IO]     Z  EN  (GPA6, shared Z1+Z2): HIGH (disabled)
[IO]     M3 EN  (GPA7):                HIGH (disabled)
[IO]   --- Drawer + tray switches ---
[IO]     DRAWER (GPB0): released
[IO]     T1SW1  (GPB1): open
[IO]     T1SW2  (GPB2): open
[IO]     T2SW1  (GPB3): open
[IO]     T2SW2  (GPB4): open
[IO]     T3SW1  (GPB5): open
